# Sift

> Signal over noise for humans and agents.

Sift is a docs-first project for a crypto news system that models articles, events, entities, and digests. The system is designed for both human operators and AI agents. Canonical truth lives in typed JSON records. Markdown is used for reading surfaces and agent handoff. Local agent access is CLI-first.

Key themes: crypto news, event clustering, provenance, rights-aware ingestion, agent-native delivery, CLI-first access, JSON contracts, Markdown digests, llms.txt.

## Start Here

- [README](README.md): Project overview, thesis, and current scope.
- [Manifesto](manifesto.md): Core principles and claim boundary.
- [Foundation Plan](docs/plans/2026-03-06-sift-v0-foundation.md): What v0 is, why it exists, and what it must ship first.
- [Execution Spec](docs/plans/2026-03-06-sift-v0-execution-spec.md): Concrete v0 implementation decisions for sources, scoring, storage, CLI, and UI.
- [Sift Pro MVP](docs/plans/2026-03-07-sift-pro-mvp.md): Post-v0 hosted premium plan with Postgres storage and Zitadel-backed identity.
- [Sift Pro Execution Plan](docs/plans/2026-03-07-sift-pro-execution-plan.md): Narrow hosted implementation path for the first paid service slice, now anchored on Postgres and Zitadel.
- [Sift Pro Slice 1 Blueprint](docs/plans/2026-03-07-sift-pro-slice-1-blueprint.md): File-level extraction plan for the shared runtime that keeps local SQLite separate from the future hosted Postgres path.
- [Siftd Runbook](docs/runbooks/siftd.md): Single-node operator runbook for deploying the hosted service with systemd, Postgres, and Zitadel.
- [CLI Entry](cmd/sift/main.go): Current Go CLI implementation entry point.
- [Server Entry](cmd/siftd/main.go): Hosted server entry point with Postgres-backed scheduler and Zitadel-protected read path.
- [Siftd Env Example](ops/env/siftd.env.example): Example hosted environment contract for systemd deployment.
- [Siftd Systemd Unit](ops/systemd/siftd.service): Hardened baseline service unit for single-node Linux deployment.

## Contracts

- [Event Schema](docs/contracts/event.schema.json): Canonical event record shape.
- [CLI Contract](docs/contracts/cli.md): Primary local access surface for agents in v0.
- [Source Registry Seed](docs/contracts/source-registry.seed.json): Approved initial source set for v0.
- [Clustering Eval Dataset](docs/contracts/clustering-eval.v0.json): Labeled title pairs for precision gate verification.
- [OpenAPI](docs/contracts/openapi.yaml): Post-v0 hosted API boundary for Sift Pro, not the primary access path for v0.

## Policy

- [Source Rights Policy](docs/policies/source-rights.md): Default rules for ingestion, storage, excerpts, and source review.

## Docs Index

- [Docs README](docs/README.md): Map of plans, policies, contracts, and research.

## Research

- [Agent-Native News Landscape](docs/research/2026-03-06-agent-native-news-landscape.md): External patterns and adjacent systems that justify the architecture.
